Interface IBuildFootprintsByRadiometryParameters2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters to the build footprints operation.

[Guid("5BA3D476-D8AE-4E69-810C-57A8ECF2BFD0")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IBuildFootprintsByRadiometryParameters2 : IBuildFootprintsByRadiometryParameters

Properties

MaximumSliverSize

The maximum allowed size (in pixels) below which a polygon may be considered as a sliver.

int MaximumSliverSize { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaximumValidDataValue 

double MaximumValidDataValue { get; set; }

Property Value

double

MaximumVertices 

int MaximumVertices { get; set; }

Property Value

int

MinimumCircularity

The circularity value below which a polygon is considered a sliver.

double MinimumCircularity { get; set; }

Property Value

double
